title: pavonia laxifolia
intro: Pavonia laxifolia, also known as Rock Rose or Pavonia, is a flowering plant species in the family Malvaceae. It is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, and is known for its pink to white flowers and heart-shaped leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Pavonia laxifolia include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, and it can be prepared as a herbal tea, salve, or infusion to harness its medicinal properties.
